---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new gameplay, parent tool, or product improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What parent or child problem are we trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the ideal flow or feature.

## Why It Matters

Explain the user impact.

## Scope Notes

Call out whether this feels like:

- MVP core
- retention improvement
- content / polish
- infrastructure

## Extra Context

Add references, sketches, or examples if helpful.
